SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer

Packages that use org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
Package
Description
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.gruler
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Golomb Rule Problem (GRP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.knapsack
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Knapsack Problem (KS) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.misp
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsp
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsptw
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Window (TSPTW) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.astar.core.solver.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.awastar.core.solver.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.solver.nolayer
 
  • Classes in org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer used by org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.gruler
    Class
    Description
    FastLowerBound
    Interface defining a lower bounding function for a state.
    Model
    Defines the core model interface for describing an optimization problem in the NoLayer API.
    Problem
    Represents an optimization problem formulated as a labeled transition system, without requiring an a priori fixed number of variables.

    Class

    Interface defining a lower bounding function for a state.
    Model
    Defines the core model interface for describing an optimization problem in the NoLayer API.
    Problem
    Represents an optimization problem formulated as a labeled transition system, without requiring an a priori fixed number of variables.

  • Classes in org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer used by org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
    Class
    Description
    AcsModel
    Defines the structure of an optimization model solved using the Anytime Column Search (ACS) algorithm within the Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) framework using the NoLayer API.
    AwAstarModel
     
    DdoModel
    Defines the interface for an unlayered Dynamic Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) model.
    FastLowerBound
    Interface defining a lower bounding function for a state.
    Model
    Defines the core model interface for describing an optimization problem in the NoLayer API.
    Problem
    Represents an optimization problem formulated as a labeled transition system, without requiring an a priori fixed number of variables.
    Relaxation
    Defines the relaxation rules for merging states in unlayered decision diagrams.
  • Classes in org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer used by org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver.nolayer
    Class
    Description
    AcsModel
    Defines the structure of an optimization model solved using the Anytime Column Search (ACS) algorithm within the Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) framework using the NoLayer API.
